examples: Doctor: Are you reading from somewhere? (00:08:04)
Doctor: Are you reading from below? (00:08:09)
Doctor: What are you looking at above? (00:09:51)
Doctor: I'm asking, what are you looking at above? What are you looking at above? (00:09:55)
Doctor: Okay, look at the camera. Look at the camera. You don't have to look anywhere else, just look at the camera. Okay? Don't look anywhere else. (00:10:45)
Customer: Height. (00:11:11) - followed by a long pause before providing the actual height.
Doctor: Any lumps, tumors? (00:12:28) - followed by a 6-second pause with no customer response before the doctor moves to the next question.
